message.thinking:
We need to answer 3 questions: Chapters, Description, Structure. For each, we need to produce JSON object with fields: "question": "One word: Chapters/Description/Structure depending on which question you are currently answering", "feedback": "Text. Information that highlights problems with the text regarding the question, i.e., why the text does not meet criteria of the question. If there are no problems, briefly highlight strong parts.", "complies": boolean.

We need to evaluate the given text: "Šis pētījums ir nozīmīgs gam akadēmiskajā vidē gan arī praktiskajā tehnoloģiju attīstībā, jo decentralizēto finanšu sistēmu izaugsme prasa jaunas un efektīvas pieejas."

We need to answer:

1. Chapters: Does the text list the main sections of the thesis? The text does not list sections; it just says the research is important. So it does not comply. Feedback: It doesn't list chapters.

2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? No, it doesn't describe contents of each section. So false.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? No. So false.

Thus all three false.

We need JSON array of 3 objects. Each object: question: "Chapters", "Description", "Structure". Provide feedback. Provide complies: false.

We must not include any other text.

Let's craft.

Also we need to ensure no extra whitespace or formatting beyond JSON array. Provide exactly the array.

Let's produce.
